content:

Also, when I try to use the WP image functionality I can upload the image to my server, but it fails to insert it into the post edit box. I can 'manually insert the code and the image will display.

Troubleshoot mode, clearing the cache did not work. But I could perform all these functions in private mode. I can't figure out whether this is a browser issue or a WP issue or a conflict between the two.

I have none of these problems in Chrome.

title: bookmarks disappeared
content:
Hi, I realized the other day when I went to use firefox that my bookmarks and history were all missing from firefox. I first tried to see if it was a profile issue like listed here: https://support.mozilla.org/en-US/kb/recover-lost-or-missing-bookmarks but even though it had another profile my history and bookmarks weren't in the other other profile either. Next I tried the next method on the page where it says you can go to manage bookmarks then once in your library you can click restore to fix it but it refuses to bring up any files or folders when I do this. Also the library is totally empty and there's none of the previous shortcuts that show up from your most common pages when you open the new tabs, but when I opened firefox the first time it had the tabs I was previously on when I opened it like the previous session. My computer is very old and sometimes doesn't like to open new applications but a web browser or folder is basic enough that I've never really had issues with it other than slowness.

I apologize for the stupid question and greatly appreciate your patience. Thank you very much for any help in advance.

title: Firefox acting improperly, and what else?
content:
FIREFOX/Mozilla O QUE ?! O Navegador, que sempre usei, PASSOU a... ‘automaticaMente’ ALTERAR a configuração MESMO CONTRARIANDO a opção do usuário !!!

Em: “Atualização do Firefox” / configuração GERAL Apresenta – como sempre o fez e É o justo • Permitir ao Firefox o Instalar atualizações automaticamente (recomendado) Quando o Firefox não estiver sendo executado o Verificar atualizações, MAS VOCÊ DECIDE SE INSTALA

MAS, sub-repticiamente Mozilla ESTÁ PROGRAMANDO – IMPONDO SEM AVISO ao usuário - que ‘instalar atualizações automaticamente’ ACONTEÇA SEMPRE E CONTRARIANDO A OPÇÃO DO USUÁRIO! ENTÃO, o que MAIS, ‘na sombra’... Mozilla pode estar fazendo AO ARREPIO da vontade do usuário ?! Pior é que ao fazer o que está fazendo APAGA TODO “os FAVORITOS” do usuário! CRIANDO ESTRESSE e trabalho ruim. Mozilla está sendo ‘sabotada em Firefox’ OU está mesmo AGINDO SORRATEIRA e prejudicial MENTE?!

OR

FIREFOX/Mozilla WHAT?!

The browser I've always used has started to... 'automatically' CHANGE the settings EVEN AGAINST the user's choice!!!

In: “Firefox Update” / GENERAL settings It shows – as it always has and rightfully so: • Allow Firefox o Install updates automatically (recommended) When Firefox is not running o Check for updates, BUT YOU DECIDE WHETHER TO INSTALL

BUT, surreptitiously Mozilla IS PROGRAMMING – IMPOSING WITHOUT WARNING to the user - that 'installing updates automatically' ALWAYS HAPPENS AND AGAINST THE USER'S CHOICE!

SO, what ELSE, 'in the shadows'... might Mozilla be doing AGAINST the user's wishes?!

What's worse is that by doing what it's doing, it DELETES ALL of the user's "FAVORITES"! CREATING STRESS and bad work.

Is Mozilla being 'sabotaged in Firefox' OR is it really ACTING SNEAKY and maliciously?!
